reviews.review_description: the games pretty good even if it’s in beta, overall 5 stars ( no glaze )

reviews.review_title: why is nobody playing this game
reviews.review_description: my friend told me to play it today and nobody else was on

developer_response.body: You were most likely playing the game when people were asleep or at school, or you were in codes that no one was in, but in different populated codes. Please do not make misleading reviews.
